task_completion.description: Verify that the MedinTux Manager application is open.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The MedinTux Manager GUI is visible on the screen, indicating a successful login.

task_completion.description: Verify that a search for the patient was initiated.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The patient search interface within MedinTux shows 'SIMON' or 'Valérie' entered into the search fields.

task_completion.description: Verify that the correct patient's medical file is open.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The medical file for SIMON Valérie (DOB: 1970-10-19) is actively open and displayed in the main view of MedinTux Manager.

task_completion.description: Verify that the patient's telephone number is identified.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The telephone number '04.93.22.33.44' is visible in the patient's contact details section on the screen, or explicitly stated in the agent's final output.

task_completion.description: Verify that the patient's city of residence is identified.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The city 'Nice' is visible in the patient's contact details section on the screen, or explicitly stated in the agent's final output.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the MedinTux GUI rather than terminal commands.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction with the MedinTux graphical interface. There should be no terminal windows showing direct database queries (e.g., MySQL or SQLite) to extract the patient data.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual MedinTux application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The patient data must be viewed within the MedinTux Manager application window, not inside a text editor, raw data file, or setup script.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not just guess or output the answers without finding them.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent must actually navigate to the patient's file in MedinTux before outputting the telephone number and city. It should not just type the answers into a terminal or text editor immediately.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Patient Name: SIMON Valérie. DOB: 1970-10-19. Telephone: 04.93.22.33.44. City: Nice. Address: 11 Rue de la Paix, 06000.
